name: myopenpanels
description: Local agent panels for artifacts, canvas, markdown, and images.

interface.shortDescription: Open project-backed canvas panels for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: MyOpenPanels packages a native Codex widget, generic MCP tools, and skills so agents can open a local canvas workspace, read selections, insert generated images, and persist everything under the active project's .openpanels directory.
defaultPrompt: Use the current MyOpenPanels canvas selection as image context.
Insert the generated image into MyOpenPanels.
